rows:
Minimum 1% contribution either provided as
public art on the development site or paid into
the public art fund to be expended within
proximity of the development site.

$150,000 plus 1% for every construction cost
dollar over $15 million, either provided as
public art on the development site or paid into
the public art fund to be expended within
proximity of the development site.

$500,000, either provided as public art on the
development site or paid into the public art
fund to be expended within proximity of the
development site; and
An additional contribution of 0.5% for every
construction cost dollar over $50 million paid
into the public art fund to be expended within
proximity of the development site.
